message: WMI-3 attacker content into authoritative position (allocated-content-into-field): content is installed into struct field 'postproc_job.ctx' — the position the confused consumer later follows as a trusted reference. [mechanism:allocated-content-into-field;indicates=WMI-3] [mem:struct=postproc_job;field=ctx;offset=144] [oracle:assert=ctx holds trusted, not attacker-determined, content;assume=externally-originated content installed into the field]
